text: Reaction: After this character enters play - search your dynasty deck for a character with printed cost 1 or less and put it into play. Shuffle.
flavorText: Come try this exotic fruit while you enjoy the pleasure of our hot springs!
name: Hot Springs Proprietor

text: Support. Action: Sacrifice a character and choose another character - ready that character. If that character is controlled by another player, honor it.
flavorText: The Unicorn will see we know the meaning of sacrifice.
name: No Breath Wasted

text: Interrupt: When a character you control would leave play, spend 1 fate - remove this holding from the game instead.
flavorText: I fear the richness of this land will make us weak.
name: Restorative Hot Spring

text: Reaction: After a conflict is declared against this province - your opponent cannot trigger character abilities or initiate keywords from characters they control until the end of the conflict. (Covert is initiated before this effect triggers.)
name: Ashen Flame Plateau

text: You may play cards under this character as if they were in your hand. Conflict Action: Even from home, look at the top 4 cards of your conflict deck and place one of them under this character. Place the rest on the bottom of your conflict deck in a random order.
name: Kakita Taneharu

text: Conflict Action: Even from home, choose another participating character - give that character +3 glory until the end of the conflict. (Max 1 per conflict.)
flavorText: I see great change coming. But not to our future. To our past.
name: Asahina Diviner

text: Reaction: After a conflict begins - reduce the cost of the first copy of each event you play during this conflict by 1. (Max 1 per conflict.)
name: Crane Industry

text: Conflict Action: Choose a [clan-crane] or Duelist character you control – until the end of the conflict, that character cannot be bowed or moved by opponents' card effects. If it was bowed during this conflict, ready it.
name: Kakita's First Kata

text: Restricted. If attached character is Bushi, it gains: "Conflict Action: Draw 1 card (draw 2 cards instead if this character is Duelist and your side is outnumbered).”
name: Twin Sister Blades

text: Reaction: After you commit a Monk character to a conflict - search the top 8 cards of your conflict deck for a Kihō card and add it to your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your conflict deck in a random order. (Max 1 per conflict.)
name: Move as One

text: Conflict Action: Choose a participating Monk character - at the end of this conflict, discard all status tokens on that character. If you have played another Kihō this conflict, you may pay 1 fate. If you do, the chosen character does not bow as a result of this conflict's resolution.
name: Surging Wave

text: Action: Choose an attachment on a character you control – move that attachment to another character you control.
flavorText: "My story did not begin with the mountains or even the Dragon. Why would you presume it would finish there?" - Togashi Tsurumi
name: Hidden Lineage

text: Interrupt: When the effects of a triggered ability on the attacked province would initiate, if this character is attacking and that province has any faceup cards in it - cancel those effects.
flavorText: A yōjimbō should not love her charge.
name: Matsu Sakura

text: Action: Sacrifice this holding and choose a card in or attached to a province - move that card to another unbroken non-stronghold province controlled by the same player. Refill this province face up. Conflict Action: Lower the strength of the attacked province by 2.
name: Stone Breaker

text: [conflict-military] Conflict Action: Discard a card - draw a card. If you are more honorable than your opponent, put a card from a discard pile onto the bottom of its corresponding deck.
name: Field of the Fallen

text: Ephemeral. This card can be played from your discard pile. Action: Bow a (friendly) non-unique character and choose a unique character - ready the chosen character.
name: Chain of Command

text: Void role only. Forced Reaction: After the fate phase begins, if attached character is ready and has at least 1 fate on it - discard each character with no fate, then remove 1 fate from each character.
name: Crippling Curse

text:
Restricted.
Reaction: After this attachment enters play - search the top 4 cards of your conflict deck for a Kihō or Spell card (or any card if attached character is a Scholar), reveal it, and add it to your hand. Put the rest at the bottom of your conflict deck in a random order.
name: Empty City Archivist

text: Play only if you control a Shugenja character. Interrupt: When 1 or more fate is removed from attached character - gain 1 fate.
flavorText: I see everything, but I do not understand.
name: There Are No Secrets

text: [conflict-political] Conflict Action: Choose a player - that player draws a card.
flavorText: "You have no right to order such inspections!" "Why? Do you have something to hide?"
name: Diplomatic Hall

text: Forced Reaction: After the conflict phase begins - each player draws 2 cards and loses 1 honor. Action: If any player has the Imperial Favor - flip the Imperial Favor.
flavorText: "I do not deserve to be exiled like this."
name: Soshi Mika

text: Reaction: After this character commits to or moves to a conflict, the defending player selects one - either flip each card in their provinces facedown, or discard each card in their provinces and refill those provinces faceup.
name: Bayushi's Saboteurs

text: Each Shinobi character you control gets +1[conflict-military] while the Imperial Favor is on the [conflict-military] side, and +1[conflict-political] while the Imperial Favor is on the [conflict-political] side.
name: Sake House Informant

text: Ephemeral. Limit 1 per deck. Interrupt: When the effect of a card ability, ring effect, or framework step would cause you to lose your last honor if the Imperial Favor is on the [conflict-political] side and it is not the draw phase - cancel that effect and gain 1 honor.
name: Funeral

text: You may play cards underneath this character as if they were in your hand. Reaction: After this character commits to a conflict - reveal the top 2 cards of your opponent's conflict deck. Put one of those cards under this character, facedown. Your opponent puts the other on the top or bottom of their deck.
name: Sand Road Merchant

text: Conflict Action: Even from home, choose an attachment - for this conflict, switch that attachment's [conflict-military] and [conflict-political] skill modifiers.
flavorText: There is more than wilderness to explore.
name: Traveling Tinkerer

text: Restricted. While you are the first player, attached character gains +1[conflict-military]. Attached character gains: “Reaction: After a character moves during a [conflict-military] conflict this character is participating in, choose a participating character with lower [conflict-military] skill than this character - bow it.”
name: Naginata

text: Water role only. No attachments. Whenever this character is at home, discard it from play. Reaction: After you play this character, choose an attacked province - for this conflict, set this character's [conflict-military] skill equal to the printed strength of that province.
name: Child of Saltless Water

text: Action: Choose a ring - attach this character to that ring as an attachment with the text "Forced Reaction: After a player declares a conflict with attached ring - that player chooses and discards a card from their hand. (Unlimited.)"
name: Crafty Tsukumogami

text: Action: Choose a card in your hand and an opponent - reveal the chosen card. Then, that player reveals 3 cards from their hand.
flavorText: Sometimes the Dragon need more creative interpretation.
name: Dragonfly Mediator

text: Action: If you control at least 3 characters with attachments - gain 1 fate.
flavorText: "If you can fight and you're loyal to my Champion, you're Mantis enough for me."
name: Mantis Bootlegger

text: Conflict Action: If you control a participating Shugenja character, choose a character that entered play during this conflict - that character does not contribute its skill toward the resolution of this conflict. With Water affinity, also remove 1 fate from it.
name: The Maiden's Icy Grasp
